## 2.1 http 参数说明


请求入参

```
{
    "eventDataDto": {
        "userName": null,
        "account": "wanghaobin",
        "formInstanceId": "c10be8f5a381479bb04ac1904e56f57b",
        "classApiName": "LCP_KGZRW",
        "workflowType": null,
        "workflowId": null,
        "nodeCode": null,
        "approvalCode": null,
        "formData": {
            "id": "c10be8f5a381479bb04ac1904e56f57b", // 表单唯一标志
            "classId": "3811c9169b164642b3532a815aa2a8a0",
            "classApiName": "LCP_KGZRW", // 表单编码
            "objAttrItemList": [ // 表单字段数据
                {
                    "attrId": "2f464398f0ab46bdafec930581be8a3f",
                    "attrType": null,
                    "apiName": "REQ_FROM_ROLE_NAME", //表单属性编码
                    "attrValue": [ // 表单属性值
                        "00246cda-852e-4c8d-8825-a344fa03b4b6",
                        "00198b95-ddb6-47ef-b0f1-de03e7343dd9",
                        "00319ac3-2b8a-4f06-bf96-5f4e7e5ff586",
                        "0055817d-b80d-4d15-970f-3c1c05502dca"
                    ],
                    "oldAttrValue": null
                }
            ],
            "bizList": {},
            "bizDataList": null,
            "dataVersion": {
                "isDataVersionOn": "1",
                "form": {
                    "versionNo": 2
                },
                "table": {},
                "mainFormDataVersion": 2
            }
        }
    },
    "programDtoList": [
        {
            "eventId": "f0ec1d88effc4c1d907c027e9efbc108",
            "formApiName": "LCP_KGZRW",
            "execClassName": "OOOPTest",
            "eventDesc": null,
            "programType": null,
            "execOrder": 1,
            "execType": "SYNC",
            "errorHandle": "CONTINUE",
            "eventDataDto": null,
            "eventHandleType": null,
            "appId": "fdcffbb9dd02426abf7e878dc2552f46",
            "tenantId": "c518f53d-b405-4111-afe1-5c082b284971",
            "actionClassName": "OOOPTest",
            "eventApiName": null,
            "eventData": null
        }
    ]
}
```


返回参数

```
{
    "status": "0",
    "message": "success",
    "data": {
        "content": {
            "resultObject": null
        }
    }
}
```
